PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-25-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Serratto for Albert Leyva, Jr. Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator (SFPA).

Mr. Ferdon stated that the SFPA would assert their priority if needed, but that the Public Administrator would delay the Estate due to their current workload. In addition, he also stated that he appreciated the Court appointing the Petitioner and that the SFPA was satisfied. Mr. Serratto stated that his client owned 75% of the property, that the estate owned 12.5%, that it was better to have one person appointed and that they intended to continue to look for additional Heirs. The Court granted the petition appointing Albert J. Leyva, Jr. the Administrator of the Estate of Luisa Fanning, (signing the order for the same in open court). The bond was set at $100,000.00.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Leticia Perez, CSR#7782. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-04-2008 Continued To Nov-25-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
